VRCForge distribution notes for com.coplaydev.unity-mcp

Upstream project:
https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp

Pinned upstream commit:
b98193db05e9a2906f491f244ccdd1766283cab3

Upstream package:
MCPForUnity / com.coplaydev.unity-mcp

License:
MIT License, copyright (c) 2025 CoplayDev.

VRCForge distributes this package as a vendored Unity dependency for the
Windows x64 installer and launcher flow. The upstream LICENSE file is kept in
the package root and is also copied into the release payload licenses folder.

VRCForge distribution changes:
- Removed external client setup helpers that are not used by the VRCForge
  launcher flow.
- Kept the Unity MCP bridge package, package metadata, upstream LICENSE, and
  runtime/editor tool sources required by the VRCForge Unity integration.

These notes are provided for attribution and distribution transparency.
